html:
THE VENDETTA GAZETTE

Special Edition • March 23, 2026 • "All the Blood That's Fit to Print"

IRON TITANS TIGHTEN DEATH GRIP AS BLOOD EMPEROR BLEEDS OUT

Citizens of Vendetta City, batten down the hatches and lock your speakeasy doors! The twin terrors of our fair city's underworld have unleashed another week of unparalleled pandemonium, with Wu-Tang "The Iron Fist of the East Side" and the perpetually polished Sir Caprice combining for a staggering 217 fresh territories in seven days of systematic slaughter!

Wu-Tang, that Oriental orchestrator of organized obliteration, has outdone even his own magnificent mayhem with 118 territories seized this week – his most ferocious land grab yet! The Iron Fist conducted a mind-boggling 107 separate raids, bringing his month-long territorial tally to an absolutely astronomical figure that has City Hall's bean counters reaching for their smelling salts.

Not to be outdone in this ballet of brutality, Sir Caprice claimed 99 pristine turfs while executing 69 precision strikes with his trademark surgical savagery. The gap between these titans of terror continues to tantalize, with sources whispering that their next direct confrontation could reshape the very geography of our blood-soaked boroughs!

But the week's most spectacular carnage belongs once again to the crumbling empire of the FIFTH BLOOD EMPEROR, who hemorrhaged another 35 precious territories while enduring a biblical 36 separate raids! This imperial implosion continues unabated, with the once-mighty monarch's crimson kingdom now resembling Swiss cheese more than a criminal empire.

SPECIAL BULLETIN: HEADQUARTERS HOLOCAUST REACHES NEW HEIGHTS!
The most spine-chilling spectacle of systematic destruction unfolded as our twin terrors delivered a combined 37 headquarters captures this week alone! Wu-Tang's educational enterprise claimed the scalps of Muna, fadly28 (twice in two days!), myfreedrop, and the unfortunate soul known only as "1" – while Sir Caprice's immaculate enforcers added Joshie, ayan, 0xweb3 (also twice!), and the mighty snakeeyes to their ever-growing trophy collection! That's right, dear readers – snakeeyes himself, once a power player, has vanished from our fair city's criminal landscape entirely!

VACATION BROTHERS SURF WAVE OF SUCCESS

Those sun-kissed sultans of sin continue their inexorable climb up Vendetta City's blood-soaked social ladder! Vacation Steve seized 44 territories this week while conducting 51 precision raids, proving once again that tropical tranquility and territorial conquest make magnificent bedfellows. His bronzed brother Vacation Albert claimed 22 fresh turfs with 40 strategic strikes of his own.

Meanwhile, that golden-haired gladiator of graft, Donald Trump, expanded his political portfolio with 37 gleaming territories, while our beloved Blood Captain proved why crimson courses through his veins with a jaw-dropping 91 raids and 18 fresh turfs for his scarlet standard!

FRESH FACES IN THE FRAY

Five brave souls have dared enter our city's criminal circus this week, including the magnificently monikered John James Rambo 🩸 (already claiming 3 turfs!), the mysterious Prosdocimus, and the heroically titled Flash Gordon. Meanwhile, a staggering 37 players have vanished from our streets entirely – including the aforementioned snakeeyes, whose 22-turf empire simply evaporated like morning mist!

POLICE BLOTTER

• Vacation Bob pulled off the week's biggest single heist, relieving his own brother Vacation Steve of $500 in cold cash – proving that blood may be thicker than water, but it ain't thicker than greenbacks!

• The mysterious "m" and the enigmatic "1" both disappeared entirely from the city roster – either they've assumed new identities or they're sleeping with the fishes.

• SCRIPTUS and GodFather each claimed exactly 17 territories this week – either it's pure coincidence or they're sharing the same crystal ball!
